evals.name: basic-preprocessing-pipeline
evals.prompt: I have the churn dataset at eda-workspace/test-datasets/churn_data.csv. Build a preprocessing pipeline for predicting the 'churned' column. Handle the missing values and encode the categoricals properly.
evals.expected_output: Should create train/test split BEFORE any transformations, use ColumnTransformer with appropriate transformers per column type, fit on train only, save pipeline artifact.

assertions.text: Splits data into train/test BEFORE any preprocessing transforms
Uses sklearn ColumnTransformer or Pipeline to organize transformations
Fits transformers on training data only (not test or full dataset)
Handles missing values in total_charges and payment_method columns
Saves the preprocessing pipeline as a serialized artifact (joblib/pickle)
Writes a preprocessing report to the report bus

evals.name: leakage-prevention
evals.prompt: Preprocess the sales data at eda-workspace/test-datasets/sales_data.csv for a regression task predicting 'revenue'. Be very careful about data leakage.
evals.expected_output: Should identify that revenue = units_sold * unit_price * (1 - discount_pct) and flag this as a leakage risk. Should not include leaky features in the pipeline.

assertions.text: Identifies that revenue is a derived column or has near-perfect correlation with other features
Drops or flags leaky features rather than including them in the pipeline
